title: $1 Bonus for Scanning 3 Receipts, 5 Receipts & 10 Receipts ($3 Total) at Eligible Stores (Opt-in Required) @ ShopBack App
body:
Deal: $1 Bonus for Scanning 3 Receipts, 5 Receipts & 10 Receipts ($3 Total) at Eligible Stores (Opt-in Required) @ ShopBack App

[hamza23] You can upload any Amazon, Uber Eats etc. invoice from the respective app to the Shopback app (tomorrow) to hit the total. There are probably others you can do it with too.
[nap enthusiast] It keeps saying my Uber invoices I downloaded as pdfs are screenshots and not accepting them. how are you getting yours approved?
[hamza23] On Android app. My orders, view receipt, download pdf, save, share to shopback app.
[test8888] per my observed, the latest version of SB app on iPhone has "bug"
- it detected some PDF as screenshot then rejected
(I tried same pdf on old ver of APP it accepted)
- it stretched some PDF so the lines crossed then couldn't recognize eligible brands
[arcticmonkey] It's ridiculous you can't send screenshots
[trixieb] Thanks hamza. I've been saving my receipts lol
[vos0003] Just so people are aware you can only submit 3 receipts per store per day.
[AsukaST] $1/3 Receipts = $0.33 each
$2/5 Receipts = $0.40 each
$3/10 Receipts = $0.30 each
I will just stop at 5 receipts.
[Herbs] What? And deny yourself of that extra $1? Crazy man!
[AsukaST] Only extra $0.20 each for receipt 6-10, but I will need to split my purchase of 5 items into 5 transactions.
I will need to wait for a few minutes between 2 transactions each time, because Shopback app is so dumb.
It will show "You've already submit this receipt." error.
Too much hassle.
[arcticmonkey] @harrribo: Yes, they promote the receipts on one hand but then have a garbage system on the other.
Makes no sense
[OnlyHans] I will need to wait for a few minutes between 2 transactions each time, because Shopback app is so dumb.
I've had other problems with receipt scanning but never that one. I just uploaded multiple receipts from the same stores earlier, one immediately after the other, and there was no issue.
